name: sgoha-tests
description: Suite de pruebas SGOHA — separada de backend y frontend

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit:backend && npm run test:unit:frontend
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:integration:api && npm run test:integration:frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:backend && npm run test:coverage:frontend && node scripts/generate-coverage-html.cjs
scripts.test:coverage:backend: node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js -c jest.unit.backend.config.cjs --coverage && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js -c jest.integration.api.config.cjs --coverage --runInBand
scripts.test:coverage:frontend: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest -c jest.unit.frontend.config.cjs --coverage --watchAll=false && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest -c jest.integration.frontend.config.cjs --coverage --watchAll=false
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
